creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text: We had a long discussion about this on #bsdports.  The problem is that upstream basically rolled a new version, but didn't rename the folder inside the tarball.  So, there is paml4.8.tgz, but inside is paml4.8/src.  Either way there has to be a hack, but it was decided to hack $WRKSRC rather than not changing PORTVERSION.
